Hey everyone, this is Russell. Welcome back to the 10X Secrets Training Class. I am so excited to bring you this interview today. Initially, if someone was just listening to the podcast, and I was brain-dumping ideas, she was taking them and implementing them. It's not just information products. It's info products, supplements, events, coaching, tickets like swag, everything they do, they use the same framework, and that's amazing. She is the founder of a company called Ladyboss Weight Loss, and some of you guys who've been in our community know her story and have seen a little bit behind the scenes, but she doesn't come on and kind of talk about it. And I remember it was the New Year's, I was on a podcast and I said, if you guys wanna make at least a million dollars in the next 12 months, this is the business model, okay? Like, you don't need business plans and whiteboards, all that stuff, like this is the model. Do a webinar once a week, live, every single week for an entire year, by the time you're done, all your money problems will disappear forever. And I've said that, and I post this podcast, and, you know, I don't know, probably 40, 50,000 people listening to that podcast episode, and I don't know, maybe a handful people have actually done it, and Kaylin was one of them. She said, okay, Russell said, do a live webinar, I'm gonna do a live webinar every single Thursday, and so she did, and she did a live webinar every single Thursday, and she talks about the interview, I think 40 weeks in a row she did this thing, right? And what's cool about it is that, every time you do the webinar, you hear different things, right? You do the presentation and you kind of, partially you'll feel like what works when it didn't work, and then you'll get the, you look at the questions and the answers people submit, and you're like, oh man, people are getting confused here, they're stuck here, let me take those things, and we'll rewrite the presentation, it makes some tweaks and changes, and you get every single week for a year, by the time it's done, your presentation's so perfect, that it's almost impossible people not to buy when they come on, Kay? You've been through my presentations, why was I able to stand on Grant Cardone's event, and do three and a half million dollars in sales in 90 minutes? They've done that presentation like a hundred times live. I know every concern is before it comes up, I know what you're thinking, as you're thinking it, I know how to resolve those concerns, because I've seen webinar after webinar after webinar, every single time at this minute point, here's all the questions that are coming in. So I know that's the questions that are coming in, so I've tweaked my presentation to get rid of those questions before they ever come, right? And so the first thing we'll talk about is just, the power of doing the webinar live, okay? Everyone wants to be lazy, they're like, oh, I'm gonna do this, I'm gonna do it live once, I'm gonna automate it, or I'm gonna record it, and then I'll put it in an automated, I'm not gonna do it live, it's like, oh, you are losing so much by doing it live. I still remember the very first time I did the Funnel Hacks presentation, the very first time, the presentation you saw at Grant's event. The very first time I did it, I was at an event, and it did well, and I remember the next day, I was heading out to the airport, and I met some lady in the hall, and she was like, hey Russell, Russell, your presentation was awesome. Unfortunately, we couldn't buy, I'm like, oh, you can afford it or what? She's like, no, I'm a coach, and I don't sell supplements, and you're talking about supplement funnels work, and I wish I sold supplements, because your things sounded awesome, and I was like, wait, what? I'm like, you can use funnels for coaching businesses too. She's like, what, really? I'm like, yeah, I have a coaching business, like I literally filled it up with funnels. She's like, are you kidding me? She's like, my friend's gonna be so excited, so she ran, and she got three of her friends, they ran in, they grabbed the order forms, they filled them, ran back out to me, as I'm heading to the plane, like here you go, thank you so much, I had no idea this would actually work for my business. And I'm like, oh my gosh, and that feedback was huge for me, so I'm in the plane flying home, I went through and I changed my slides, like if you watch the presentation, you notice the whole section, I'm like, this will work for this business, and this business, and this business, and I show it works for all these other businesses, right? Then I landed in Boise, and I had a webinar lined up, and I remember that morning, I think we had, I think about 500 or so people to register for this webinar, jumped on the webinar, I did the presentation, and we sold like $30,000 in sales, and it did good, I was excited, and then I had another webinar happening four hours later, but what I did is that when the webinar was done, that first one, in the webinar software, I used to export all the questions that people were asking, I'd export all the questions, I'd start reading through them, I'm like, oh my gosh, everyone's confused about this, and they're confused about this, so during that four hour gap I went through, and I started changing my slides, and adding things, and editing things, and tweaking stuff up, four hours later I did a webinar to a smaller audience, there were less people there, did the presentation, and we did over $100,000 in sales, okay? What was the difference? The difference was I was taking the feedback, changing it, taking the feedback, changing it, and then over and over and over and over again, I did my webinar live over 50 times before I ever automated it, okay? Now most of you guys won't do that, okay? I know that, you're not gonna do that, but I promise you, if you do do that, your presentation will be better, you'll make more money, like, ah, it's just, it's, anyway, if you trust me, do it. Plan a live webinar week for the next year, and if you do that, by the time you're done, you'll be amazing at the presentation. So that's number one. Number two, we talk about this in the interview, a little while later is when we kind of pioneered this concept that we now call, like, the perfect webinar hack, or the Facebook live version of the webinar, and so I did one, again, this is after me doing hundreds of webinars live on a webinar, I decided to go live on Facebook and just click go on Facebook live and do my webinar live, but because I'd done so many times, I knew the concerns, I knew the stories, I knew the process, and so I was able to do it, and I'll tell you the story in the interview, I killed it, and we killed it with the Facebook live webinar, and then Katelyn saw me do it, and like two days later, she did a Facebook live webinar, she crushed it, and a lot of people have seen her Facebook live webinar that I think it did a million dollars first 30 days with it, and they've since used this as a tool to completely dramatically scale the company, and people are like, oh, I'm gonna do a Facebook live webinar, and they jump on the very first time to do a Facebook live, and they completely bomb, and they're like, why did I bomb? And it's like, the reason why a Facebook live webinar works is because Katelyn did it live 30 or 40 times before she ever did that, Russell did it live 30 or 40 times before he ever did it, like, you have to master your pitch here before you ever do it here, okay? You think about like, a great comedian doesn't just go one day on Jay Leno or, you know, tonight's show or whatever, he gives a microphone, and they're like, stand up on stage, and like, perfect, you know, give this amazing act that everyone dies laughing, right? How does the comedian do it, right? The comedian will go, and they'll go live, right? They'll go to a bar, like a dive bar, and they'll write 10 jokes, and they'll tell these 10 jokes, another 10, maybe two of them land, and the other eight just bombed. Now, if they were doing that live on Facebook, they would've been like the worst act ever, right? But they said, okay, these two jokes were awesome, the other eight weren't, because they throw away the other eight jokes, they write eight new ones, now they have 10 new jokes, they go to the next Facebook live, they do it, boom, and this time, three of the jokes land and the other seven bomb, right? And they do that over, and they go from dive bar to dive bar to dive bar, for us, it's like, live webinar to live webinar to live webinar, and eventually you end up, we have 10 stories, 10 jokes, 10 things you know just nail every single time, and then you go on the big stage, right? That's when you get invited to Jimmy Kimmel, and you pick up the mic, and you just slay it, you just crush it from everybody, right? They're always, we wanna just come up here on the big stage and just kill it, and it's like, no, you have to do your work, okay? Great comedians do the work, great presenters do the work, and so doing a live, on a live webinar is how you do your work, how you cut your teeth, how you get your presentation perfect, and after you have that, then this becomes a tool that's just huge for you, okay? Yeah, so basically, long story short is, we were just broke, you're coming out of a network marketing company, we were like, we don't wanna do this anymore, like let's do something else, and then someone actually showed us ClickFunnels, that used to do like Google AdWords and stuff like that, and they showed us ClickFunnels, we were like, oh, it's like the coolest thing ever, and then you started like chasing us around the internet, and that's when we saw like one of your ads, and you know, we finally got signed up, and when we opened up like everything that you're talking about now, and opened up the program, we like started going through like, little by little, like my husband would make us stop, Brandon would make us stop, because he's like the smart one, right? He's like the genius, and then I'm like the wild crazy one on the front with like the content, right? So you have Brandon who's like, no, we have to stop it, like every minute, every time he tells us to do something, we have to stop it and actually do it, and we just started doing that, and we started building momentum and creating, because we didn't have a product, we didn't have anything. So we literally went through the whole process of product creation, webinar creation, like email sequences, like just every tiny little thing, because we knew absolutely nothing, like absolutely nothing about internet marketing. All we knew was that we wanted to help people, we wanted to help women, we wanted to help people, and we wanted to do it online, so we could actually like scale ourselves, because before it was very like time-based for us, it was like training time for money, and we couldn't scale our businesses without us, like working more hours the day, and so we kind of reverse engineered what we wanted, and just went through all of the products, like literally step by step, and stopped every minute, every three minutes, and if you were like telling us something that was gonna take like two days to do it, like we weren't allowed to come back and watch anymore, until we went through those two days of writing like entire email sequences, and then we could finally come back and watch the video, and so that's kind of like how this whole thing got started, and literally just executing on every little tiny thing, like as it was told to us, instead of like waiting until we went through the whole train, and then coming back and being like, okay, so where should we start now, right? Which like I totally would have done, but you know, Brandon was like, no, like we have to do it right now, so that's kind of how it all got rolling. It's so awesome. You told, you told Brandon and I, that we weren't allowed to do another offer, I think it was like, when we like approached you at Phone Hack and Live or something, and Brandon was like, so what should we do, should we like do supplements next, should we do this, blah blah blah, I'm like, we didn't even know you then, and you were like, until you make like a million dollars with that offer, and like you've done a webinar every single week, like do not sell anything else, and we were just like, okay, and then we went and did a webinar every single Thursday, seven mountain time, nine Easter time, every single Thursday, I think of that year, we did like, I don't know, like 40 webinars or something like 38 webinars, 40 webinars, like of that year, like starting in like March, when Funnel Hack and Live was, and we literally did one every single week, every single week, every single week, and I was almost like, oh my gosh, I have to do this again, like it's the same thing, but honestly, like it just, I know like people are like, why do I have to do it every single week if I like sold on the first one, but it teaches you who your customers are so much, because as you change, like what we found is like, as ads change on the front end, as like, you're warm people, like go away, and you're getting more cold people on your webinar, like it's completely different customer, right? And so it just dials in, you know, people think it's like overnight success with us, but we've just dialed in with our customers so much because we're willing to like do it so many times, we're willing to do the webinar so many times, that at the end of every webinar, we would literally print out every single comment, every comment, and we would go through it, and we would see every objection, and webinar to webinar changes, right? So we're running ads to these different demographics that are getting people on our webinar, their questions are different than last week's, and so we just made like a giant, like we just compiled, compiled, compiled, compiled, and that's what just crafted my message so well on the front was because we had all these different people coming from different places, and we recognized that instead of thinking like, oh, everyone that gets on is just the same, like is the same person, and so from week to week, it taught us like really all of the dimensions, like all the spokes of our customer, like we know like to a T, to every exact question that that person and that demographic is gonna ask, and then we are able to, like I'm able to overcome those objections because I know like so in such great detail who each of those people are, so I think that's like the greatest thing about doing it live every week is because it's always different people, it's not the same. It's the same pitch with a couple of things changed at the end that you learned from last week, but it's not the same people which like, it just helps you dial in, like you're able to sell to them better, which is important. So cool, it's funny because I saw many people who like you said they will, even some of them will even do it live once, they just like sit in their room, they record it once, and they're like, okay, it's live, I don't wanna do it live, because I don't wanna have to be forced to do it live every single week, and I'm like, it makes it that fun, like in any other business, like everyone, like if you have a job, you do the same thing all the time, right? For some reason they all don't wanna do a webinar live every week, it's like that's the most valuable thing you could possibly be doing, because first off, it generates money, second off, you learn how to speak, you find your voice, you learn your, like the objections, all the stuff you said, and very few people ever do it, and I'm so proud that you did, and I look now two and a half, three years later, like I think one of the big reasons why you guys have grown so huge, you know, on top of obviously you guys mean amazing, but just like you know your audience and your customer better than anybody else, and that goes along the way, I feel like me it was the same thing, I think we've tracked like it was like 50 or 60 live times I did it before we automated after that, and it was the same thing, like I know what my audience is thinking and saying before they even know it, so it's like, when you know that and you can address that up front, and the concerns you address them before they ever even come up in their head. And that was like probably the craziest thing like ever, and what happened was, I basically had my like three sheets of paper in my hand, I had like the three secrets, it was like the title of the webinar, and then it was like each secret, and I would just like throw the pieces of paper, and we delivered that whole webinar on a Facebook live, and that webinar did us like over a million dollars in like 30 days or something crazy, but like the cool thing is, is like all the women that just like signed up, they were just like hot and ready on Facebook, like wanted to do it, wanted to change the live, like wanted to you know, like do it, and it was just awesome like seeing that happen, but it also took like all those times of me doing the webinar a million freaking times up to that point to like perfect that and do that, you know, like that was crazy. I had someone explain to their day to me, but they talk about like a great comedian, right? Doesn't just like also get on Jimmy Fallon, get the microphone and tell us thing, like land these jokes, right? It's like he's in the dive bar, and he does it like once, and then tries it, and then you know, he does 10 jokes, like two jokes, lamp, and then eight bomb, there's another dive bar, and he writes new jokes, and he gets three of the land, and eventually it gets the whole thing perfect, then he goes live. A lot of people have seen what you do, they try to go live on Facebook, it's like they don't have the foundation, and it's like, whoa, it doesn't work. Exactly, because like the reason I was able to do it in 30 minutes, right? Cause it wasn't, normally my webinar was like 75 minutes long, and it was just like me speeding it up, and like doing the secrets, and like a little bit of each secret, and doing it, but it's like I've delivered the webinar so many times, literally memorized, I could say it in my sleep, like you're like, kid, do your webinar right now, I'll be able to like do my webinar. So like when you're at that point, like now's time to go like direct, like face to face with the consumer without like webinars and slides and things in between, that allows you to perfect that, but you know, once you are at that level, then it's definitely like worth doing for sure.
